doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's static helper mpfr_fpif_read_precision_from_file (mpfr/src/fpif.c L248-L302). Deserialises an fpif-encoded precision from a byte buffer at a given cursor position.

Format (fpif.c L30-L43): see mpfr_fpif_store_precision spec.

Class 'substrate' per ADR 0004 -- Uint8Array boundary, explicit cursor.

TS substrate signature (locked by ADR 0004 worked example):
  fpif_read_precision(bytes: Uint8Array, pos: number)
    -> { precision: bigint; nextPos: number }

Throws MPFRError('EDOMAIN') per ADR Invariant 5 on malformed input (truncated buffer, precision-byte = 0 with empty payload, precision encoding overflows mpfr_prec_t).

Wire-form harness signature (this spec):
  Inputs:
    bytes_value (decimal-bigint, little-endian unsigned interpretation of the byte buffer)
    byte_length (int, exact buffer length so leading-zero bytes are preserved)
    pos (int, starting cursor)
  Output: { precision: <decimal-bigint>, nextPos: <int> }

The TS port reconstructs the Uint8Array via bigIntToBytes(bytes_value, byte_length), then runs fpif_read_precision(bytes, pos).

Only well-formed inputs appear in the golden -- the runner classifies an exception as n_throw (failure). Edge cases that the C side rejects with `return 0` are EXCLUDED from the golden to keep grading meaningful.

Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c:
Five divergences:

  1. Input shape: C ext_data_ptr (vtable + state) -> TS (Uint8Array, position) per ADR 0004 Invariant 2.

  2. Return shape: C bare mpfr_prec_t (0 = error sentinel) -> TS {precision, nextPos} on success; throws MPFRError('EDOMAIN') on malformed input per ADR Invariant 5.

  3. Endianness: collapsed to single LE implementation (ADR 0004 Invariant 3).

  4. Range check: the C source rejects precisions whose top bit is set (so the unsigned read wouldn't fit in the signed mpfr_prec_t). The TS port keeps this -- precision returns are bigint and could in principle overflow mpfr_prec_t conventions; we enforce the same upper bound.

  5. Wire shape: input bytes carried as (decimal-bigint, byte_length) pair.
refs: mpfr/src/fpif.c L30-L43 -- precision field format spec.
docs/adr/0004-binary-io-api.md -- ADR locking the API + wire shape.
